title: codeArbiter farm plan
description: The handoff artifact writing-plans emits in --farm mode. Each task is a self-contained work packet a cheap Zen worker can complete. meta.model and meta.apiBaseUrl are written by subagent-driven-development at dispatch time (not at plan-authoring time).

model.description: Zen model selected at dispatch time by subagent-driven-development's model research step. Not set at plan-authoring time.

apiBaseUrl.description: OpenAI-compatible endpoint base URL. Set at dispatch time alongside model.

id.description: Unique, kebab-case. Becomes the branch name farm/<id>.

description.description: One concrete unit of work, scoped tightly enough that a cheap model can do it.

deps.description: Task ids that must be GREEN before this one runs.

filesInScope.description: The ONLY paths the worker may create or edit. Enforced by drift detection after each worker run.

path.description: Path to the failing test writing-plans already wrote. Workers must NOT touch it.

commands.description: Shell commands; ALL must exit 0. Typically: run this test, run full suite, lint, typecheck.

context.description: Minimal context slice — relevant types/interfaces/conventions only. NOT the whole module.
